title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
